data.name: Hentai World Halloween
data.detailed_description:
Step into a captivating puzzle experience where you assemble gorgeous images of stunning girls. Piece together the jigsaw puzzles to unveil vivid and charming illustrations that are sure to delight.

Featuring an array of beautiful and visually appealing characters, the game challenges you to swap and arrange puzzle pieces thoughtfully. Progress through levels to uncover more breathtaking pictures, all while enjoying the relaxed pace with no time limits.

Its simple yet immersive gameplay ensures endless fun, making it an addictive pastime perfect for hours of relaxation and enjoyment.

Features:

Stunning illustrations of charming girls paired with relaxing background music.

Unlock full-view mode to admire each image after completing a level.

Multiple levels with varying difficulties to keep the experience engaging and enjoyable.

data.short_description: This is a captivating game featuring stunning and charming girls. Immerse yourself in the jigsaw puzzle mechanics, arranging pieces to reveal the full picture of these eye-catching characters.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
